title: Salmasia cupanii
intro:

Salvia is a genus of plants that includes Salmasia, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The health benefits of Salvia species, including Salmasia cupanii, include their potential to improve cognitive function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Salvia species include iridoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for their medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Salvia species include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve mental clarity, and support overall well-being.
